raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/2023 I attempted to purchase two window installations from XXXX XXXX XXXX as a result of a door to door solicitation. However, the Company fraudulently charged by American Express Card for a deposit of {$8300.00} for window installation throughout my house. Additionally, I never received any windows from the Company. .I promptly notified the Company and American Express that I never authorized these charges. Furthermore, my credit limit at the time of the transaction was only {$4700.00}. To date, Amercian Express has refused to credit my account or provide an explanation as to why they would arbitrarily increase my credit limit to {$8300.00} for this transaction without my personal request, knowledge, and consent.

As a senior, I have never felt so violated and taken advantage of. To be clear, the Company has taken and refused to refund {$8300.00} for windows that I never received and American Express is refusing to credit my account. Adding insult to injury, my Amercian Express account is accumulating interest and late fees all to my loss and damage. 

Please so kindly assist in the resolution of this matter. I am seeking a full refund from XXXX XXXX XXXX to clear the fraudulent charges on my American Express card or a full credit of these charges by American Express and any further appropriate relief. 

Thank you for your attention to this matter.
